description: NLI-based confidence measurement for MetaGPT-generated user stories. Identical methodology to AgentsSociety NLI measurement: same model (khalidalt/DeBERTa-v3-large-mnli), same entailment threshold (0.6), same metrics (alignment score = precision of grounded claims; extrapolation rate = fraction with no spec match).

facts: clinical urgency. It ensures critical cases are surfaced to medical.
The system register incoming patients with their name and presenting symptoms.
The system assign each patient an urgency level from 1 (critical) to 5 (non-urgent) based on the symptoms.
The system order the queue by urgency level first, then by arrival time within the same level.
The system reorder the queue immediately whenever a new patient arrives or an existing patient is re-triaged to a different urgency level.
The system let a physician take the patient at the head of the queue, removing them from the queue.
The system show a live dashboard of the queue with each patient's urgency and waiting time.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to see the queue sorted by urgency and arrival time.
evidence.fact: The system show a live dashboard of the queue with each patient's urgency and waiting time.

evidence.claim: The queue reflects their new priority immediately.
evidence.fact: The system reorder the queue immediately whenever a new patient arrives or an existing patient is re-triaged to a different urgency level.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to view a live dashboard showing each patient's urgency and waiting time.
evidence.fact: The system show a live dashboard of the queue with each patient's urgency and waiting time.

facts: blood bank. It manages compatibility between blood types, monitors.
The system track blood units by ABO type, Rh factor, and collection date, with expiry fixed at 42 days after collection.
The system accept transfusion requests specifying blood type, Rh factor, and quantity.
The system match requests to compatible units using standard ABO/Rh donor compatibility (exact-type matches first, then closest expiry first).
The system reserve matched units, and release a reservation back to stock if it is not confirmed as issued within 24 hours.
The system automatically expire units past their expiry date and exclude them from matching.
The system raise a shortage alert whenever available stock of any blood type falls below 5 units.
The system show a dashboard of stock per type, units expiring within 7 days, and open requests.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to submit a transfusion request specifying blood type, Rh, and quantity.
evidence.fact: The system accept transfusion requests specifying blood type, Rh factor, and quantity.

facts: The system register incoming and outgoing flights with their estimated times.
The system allocate each flight the earliest available 5-minute slot on either runway at or after its estimated time, with a 3-minute separation gap between consecutive slots on the same runway.
The system give arrivals priority over departures when competing for the same slot.
The system detect and prevent any overlapping or gap-violating assignments on the same runway.

The system allow a runway to be closed, automatically reassigning its future flights to the other runway and marking flights as delayed if they cannot be placed within 60 minutes of their estimated time.
The system immediately give a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot and re-queue displaced flights by the normal rules.
The system show a slot timetable per runway with delayed flights and emergency events.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to register flights with their estimated times.
evidence.fact: The system register incoming and outgoing flights with their estimated times.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to close a runway and have the system automatically reassign flights to the other runway, marking delayed flights clearly.
evidence.fact: The system allow a runway to be closed, automatically reassigning its future flights to the other runway and marking flights as delayed if they cannot be placed within 60 minutes of their estimated time.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to declare an emergency and have the system immediately assign the earliest slot, displacing other flights as needed.
evidence.fact: The system immediately give a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot and re-queue displaced flights by the normal rules.

evidence.claim: The system enables users to view a clear timetable per runway showing all slots, delayed flights, and emergency events.
evidence.fact: The system show a slot timetable per runway with delayed flights and emergency events.

facts: failed transaction is fully rolled back.
The system authenticate users by card number and PIN before any transaction, locking the account after 3 consecutive failed attempts.
The system decline withdrawals exceeding the account balance or the daily limit per calendar day.
The system process each withdrawal atomically, rolling back all steps completely if any step fails so the balance is unchanged.
The system detect suspicious withdrawal patterns and flag the transactions for administrator review.
The system let administrators review flagged transactions, lock or unlock accounts, and view transaction histories.
The system record every authentication attempt and transaction state change with a timestamp.
